auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Wasaw Enterprises, Wasaw Food Services LP, Wasaw Construction LP, Wasaw NL Cottages LP, Wasaw Development LP, Wasaw Projects Inc, Five Mile Dock Services Ltd, 1486244 Ontario Ltd. Heron Landing Golf Course fully consolidated. Agency One Trust created in 2020 not proportionately consolidated.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) GBE financial information largely unaudited so equity method adjustments cannot be verified; (2) Agency One Trust not proportionately consolidated as required by PSAS, and trust income booked on cash basis rather than accrual basis — revenue understated by $115,648 and receivables/accumulated surplus understated by $233,791. Auditor firm name not explicitly named in document, only described as Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants in Fort Frances, Ontario. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as federal ($10,567,745) plus provincial ($1,353,801) = $11,921,546. OSR = $18,734,956 minus $11,921,546 = $6,813,410. Annual debt service reflects principal repayments per cash flow statement of $544,832. num_subsidiaries = 1 (Heron Landing Golf Course fully consolidated). num_gbes = 12 Wasaw-related entities accounted for by modified equity method.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
